# Golax India Pvt Ltd

> India-based IT company offering web development, software development, mobile apps, digital marketing, SEO and IT consulting — serving 25+ cities across India and clients in 12+ countries (US, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, Singapore, Germany, New Zealand, Qatar, Saudi Arabia). Headquartered in Patna, Bihar.

Contact: +91 94700 24607 · contact@golaxindia.com · Sneh Highway Views, Bypass Rd, Kankarbagh, Patna 800020, India.

## Company

- [Home](/): Overview — India's trusted IT partner for web, apps, software and digital marketing.
- [About](/about): Company history, team, mission — founded 2014 in Patna, serving India and globally.
- [Industries](/industries): Healthcare, education, retail, manufacturing, finance and more.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Projects and case studies across India.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles in development, design and marketing.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email or form — free consultation.

## Services

- [All Services](/services): Full IT services for India and international clients.
- [Web Development](/services/web-development): Websites, e-commerce, web apps — React, Next.js, WordPress.
- [Software Development](/services/software-development): ERP, CRM, SaaS, custom enterprise software.
- [Mobile App Development](/services/mobile-app-development): iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native.
- [Digital Marketing](/services/digital-marketing): SEO, Google Ads, social media, content marketing.
- [IT Consulting](/services/it-consulting): Cloud migration, DevOps, cybersecurity, managed IT.
